[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000111 3
1 00000110 2
2 10100100 3
3 00010101 3
4 00010101 3
5 10000001 2
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a
